name: Gansu Jiu Steel Group Hongxing Iron & Steel Co.,Ltd.
summary: Gansu Jiu Steel Group Hongxing Iron & Steel Co.,Ltd. produces and sells iron and steel and their rolled products in China, South Korea, Japan, the United States, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. It offers wiring, stainless steel, and continuous steel billet casting products, as well as rods, and medium and roll plates. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Jiayuguan, China. Gansu Jiu Steel Group Hongxing Iron & Steel Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of Jiuquan Iron & Steel (Group) Co., Ltd.
